documentation: Hugging Face is a collaborative platform and open-source ecosystem for machine learning. It provides the Transformers library, Model Hub, and Dataset Hub, acting as the standard repository for open-source AI models.
pricing: Hub is Free. Pro account is $9/month. Enterprise Hub starts at $20/user/month. Inference Endpoints are billed per hour based on compute.
release_notes: Transformers v4.40 introduced native support for Llama-3 and optimized memory-efficient attention implementations.
